title: Merry Brazilian Guava Mousse
description: A jammy, shattering mousse that celebrates Brazilian flavors with guava, coconut cream, and a touch of all-purpose seasoning.
instructions: Peel, deseede, and puree the guava flesh until smooth, yielding 400g of guava puree.
Gently heat the coconut milk and heavy cream together in a saucepan over low heat until 40°C, stirring constantly.
Whisk the stevia powder into the warm coconut‑cream mixture until fully dissolved.
Add the all‑purpose seasoning to the mixture and stir until evenly distributed.
Fold the guava puree into the coconut‑cream mixture until fully incorporated.
Spoon the mousse mixture into four ramekins, smoothing the tops with a spatula.
Chill the ramekins in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to set the mousse.
Garnish each ramekin with a tablespoon of unsweetened shredded coconut before serving.
